query: SELECT u.name, u.openId, ua.ticker, ua.companyName, ua.sector, ua.sortOrder FROM userAssets ua JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.userId ORDER BY u.id, ua.sortOrder, ua.id LIMIT 200;
